Strong Acid Cation / Anion Resins

Water Treatment • Ion Exchange

Water Treatment

Strong Acid Cation / Anion Resins

Ion exchange resins are used for softening, demineralization, and polishing in boiler and process water systems.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Softening, demineralization, boiler feed water treatment
Typical Specifications
Uniform bead size, exchange capacity, low fines, process stability
Grades / Forms
Beads
Technical Notes
Select resin type and bead size from the process water analysis and operating cycle requirements.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
